payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden side table with a glossy finish; visible rectangular top and a small central drawer with a brass knob, tabletop holds cropped items; appears bedside-sized and photographed at approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.
